# Scheduler / Autotune PRs

Optimization recipe: Treat scheduler/autotune configs as shape-specific evidence; replay benchmark shapes before generalizing.

NCU first look: SM occupancy, waves/SM, active cycles, tail effects, and load imbalance.

## Inspection Questions

- Which shape regime caused the scheduling change?
- Can the idea become a dispatcher rule rather than one monolithic kernel?

## PRs

| Repo | PR | Merged | What to inspect | Ledger key |
